title: PearlTrajectory
description: shows where the ender pearl is lit
body:
PearlTrajectory is a lightweight and convenient mod that shows the path of your ender pearl after you throw it, so you can track exactly where it’s going.

✨ Features:

Visualizes the trajectory of thrown ender pearls in real time.

Helps you see where your pearl lands for better planning in PvP or parkour.

Works seamlessly without interrupting normal gameplay.

Fully compatible with other mods

🎮 Why download:

If you frequently use ender pearls, PearlTrajectory makes it easier to track your throws and adjust your strategy on the fly. No more guessing where your pearl went—watch it fly and land!
